-94.723442,-94.7378017008,-96.5964126587,-96.6242141724,-93.8203353882,-93.7613677979,-95.1667709351,-95.219505,-96.6884536743,-96.6628338397,-93.9318008423,-93.9808731079,-97.135345,-97.130672,-96.3074798584,-96.2744895369,-94.0680389404,-94.043762207,-94.0156296641,-94.0012283325,-97.467338,-97.479835,-94.3838392943,-94.376083374,-96.937088,-97.4492937326,-95.2805938721,-97.229186967,-96.739547,-95.0363006592,-96.4476394653,-96.469993,-94.3587341309,-96.8409423828,-94.8282546997,-95.126625061,-96.9923400879,-95.4826126099,-97.217704,-96.9011077881,-96.8907546997,-97.1459962428,-95.806015,-96.8220672011,-97.0852127075,-96.6179656982,-97.7881546021,-95.0268895179,-95.7194519043,-94.1960129142,-94.8919067383,-97.1757354736,-95.1165161133,-97.2236730158,-95.5727157593,-96.6369934082,-77.4658050537,-77.4412765503,-78.4810180664,-78.5027542114,-76.252571106,-76.4091720581,-77.5119935721,-77.4981689453,-77.4981231689,-76.4111328125,-76.3899307251,-78.8463668823,-78.9080047607,-76.4580612183,-76.5009972453,-77.3439178467,-77.528175354,-77.4228057861,-77.4942779541,-79.9695053101,-79.99243927,-77.3282470703,-77.3373718262,-76.1859970093,-76.189178,-76.7114486694,-76.6740722656,-76.6894989014,-76.7247238159,-78.1657562256,-78.1552505493,-78.9381942749,-77.4685719609,-81.0571470112,-79.9036865234,-77.4743881226,-76.635635376,-79.0394363403,-79.411567688,-78.2143325806,-77.4596073478,-79.185584709,-77.5937805176,-77.3921585083,-80.6899719238,-77.3257141113,-77.325007394,-77.4103277922,-80.3587722778,-89.6382522583,-89.6609725952,-77.9869745672,-77.957669422,-82.3657913208,-78.0433827639],40,null,null,{"interactive":true,"className":"","stroke":true,"color":"#ffa500","weight":3,"opacity":0.5,"fill":true,"fillColor":"#ffa500","fillOpacity":0.8},null,null,null,{"interactive":false,"permanent":false,"direction":"auto","opacity":1,"offset":[0,0],"textsize":"10px","textOnly":false,"className":"","sticky":true},null,null]},{"method":"addTiles","args":["//{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png",null,null,{"minZoom":0,"maxZoom":18,"tileSize":256,"subdomains":"abc","errorTileUrl":"","tms":false,"noWrap":false,"zoomOffset":0,"zoomReverse":false,"opacity":1,"zIndex":1,"detectRetina":false,"attribution":"&copy; <a href=\"http://openstreetmap.org\">OpenStreetMap<\/a> contributors, <a href=\"http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/\">CC-BY-SA<\/a>"}]}],"limits":{"lat":[24.5697359741,43.1027984619],"lng":[-117.873054,-75.2283325195]}},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}</script>
<p>Ah! Now I have a good working theory. If you’re from Seattle, you may have never seen a Waffle House before. You’ve never had that cursed experience and your life is less complete for it. (Of course, since my location dataset has not been updated since 2015, this may have changed. Perhaps I should try to collect more up to date data and run this analysis again!)</p>
<p>Plotting the locations of important buildings, businesses, and people can help us answer questions about access to resources— whether that is to polling places, primary schools, or Waffle Houses.</p>
<p>That brings us to the end of our tutorial. As always, the whole script is below (slightly rearranged so it will hopefully run smoothly on your computer). One note: you need to download the Waffle House locations onto your PC if you’d like to load that graph, without it, that section of the code will break!</p>
</div>
<div id="the-whole-script" class="section level1">
<h1>The whole script</h1>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb21"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb21-1"><a href="#cb21-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>knitr<span class="sc">::</span>opts_chunk<span class="sc">$</span><span class="fu">set</span>(<span class="at">echo=</span><span class="cn">TRUE</span>, <span class="at">warning=</span><span class="cn">FALSE</span>, <span class="at">message=</span><span class="cn">FALSE</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-2"><a href="#cb21-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Setting up my RmD file</span></span>
<span id="cb21-3"><a href="#cb21-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-4"><a href="#cb21-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(knitr)</span>
<span id="cb21-5"><a href="#cb21-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># A package for knitting things together!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-6"><a href="#cb21-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-7"><a href="#cb21-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">#### LOAD PACKAGES ####</span></span>
<span id="cb21-8"><a href="#cb21-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(dataverse) <span class="co"># loading data</span></span>
<span id="cb21-9"><a href="#cb21-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(urbnmapr)  <span class="co"># geographic information for mapping!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-10"><a href="#cb21-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(ggplot2)   <span class="co"># pretty plots</span></span>
<span id="cb21-11"><a href="#cb21-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(geofacet)  <span class="co"># tile plots</span></span>
<span id="cb21-12"><a href="#cb21-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(scales)    <span class="co"># easy formatting</span></span>
<span id="cb21-13"><a href="#cb21-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(dplyr)     <span class="co"># data manipulation</span></span>
<span id="cb21-14"><a href="#cb21-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(survey)    <span class="co"># survey analysis</span></span>
<span id="cb21-15"><a href="#cb21-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(tidyverse) <span class="co"># the holy grail: more data wrangling</span></span>
<span id="cb21-16"><a href="#cb21-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-17"><a href="#cb21-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(leaflet)   <span class="co"># optional: for interactive maps!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-18"><a href="#cb21-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(here)</span>
<span id="cb21-19"><a href="#cb21-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-20"><a href="#cb21-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##### LOADING DATA ####</span></span>
<span id="cb21-21"><a href="#cb21-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ces2020_dataverse <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">get_dataframe_by_name</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-22"><a href="#cb21-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">filename =</span> <span class="st">&quot;CES20_Common_OUTPUT_vv.dta&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-23"><a href="#cb21-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">dataset =</span> <span class="st">&quot;10.7910/DVN/E9N6PH&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-24"><a href="#cb21-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">original =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-25"><a href="#cb21-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">.f =</span> haven<span class="sc">::</span>read_dta,</span>
<span id="cb21-26"><a href="#cb21-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">server =</span> <span class="st">&quot;dataverse.harvard.edu&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-27"><a href="#cb21-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb21-28"><a href="#cb21-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Let&#39;s select variables that we care about!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-29"><a href="#cb21-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ces2020_selected <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> ces2020_dataverse <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-30"><a href="#cb21-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">select</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-31"><a href="#cb21-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-32"><a href="#cb21-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># id for each respondent</span></span>
<span id="cb21-33"><a href="#cb21-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    caseid, </span>
<span id="cb21-34"><a href="#cb21-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-35"><a href="#cb21-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># did you take the post-election survey?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-36"><a href="#cb21-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    tookpost, </span>
<span id="cb21-37"><a href="#cb21-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-38"><a href="#cb21-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># state respondent is living in.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-39"><a href="#cb21-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># In this code, I am both selecting</span></span>
<span id="cb21-40"><a href="#cb21-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># the inputstate column and renaming</span></span>
<span id="cb21-41"><a href="#cb21-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># it to state_fips rough, all in</span></span>
<span id="cb21-42"><a href="#cb21-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># one line!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-43"><a href="#cb21-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">state_fips_rough =</span> inputstate) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-44"><a href="#cb21-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">mutate</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-45"><a href="#cb21-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-46"><a href="#cb21-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># tookpost is originally coded so 2 = Yes</span></span>
<span id="cb21-47"><a href="#cb21-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># and 1 = No. I am recoding it so Yes = 1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-48"><a href="#cb21-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># and No = 0. Why? When I do calculations, </span></span>
<span id="cb21-49"><a href="#cb21-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># the average of tookpost will be a proportion</span></span>
<span id="cb21-50"><a href="#cb21-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># between 0 and 1 that I can represent as a </span></span>
<span id="cb21-51"><a href="#cb21-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># percent (ex. &quot;85% of respondents took the</span></span>
<span id="cb21-52"><a href="#cb21-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># post-election survey&quot;).</span></span>
<span id="cb21-53"><a href="#cb21-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">tookpost_recoded =</span> <span class="fu">case_when</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-54"><a href="#cb21-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      tookpost <span class="sc">==</span> <span class="dv">1</span> <span class="sc">~</span> <span class="dv">0</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-55"><a href="#cb21-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      tookpost <span class="sc">==</span> <span class="dv">2</span> <span class="sc">~</span> <span class="dv">1</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-56"><a href="#cb21-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    ),</span>
<span id="cb21-57"><a href="#cb21-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-58"><a href="#cb21-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># why am I changing state_fips_rough? Like</span></span>
<span id="cb21-59"><a href="#cb21-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># most coding, things were breaking which inspired</span></span>
<span id="cb21-60"><a href="#cb21-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># me to get creative. Try running this chunk without</span></span>
<span id="cb21-61"><a href="#cb21-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># this line and look at ces2020_selected. See anything</span></span>
<span id="cb21-62"><a href="#cb21-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># weird? Check before you read on!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-63"><a href="#cb21-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">state_fips =</span> <span class="fu">as.character</span>(<span class="fu">sprintf</span>(<span class="st">&quot;%02d&quot;</span>, state_fips_rough))</span>
<span id="cb21-64"><a href="#cb21-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-65"><a href="#cb21-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># Okay, now that you&#39;ve looked, I&#39;ll spill the beans. </span></span>
<span id="cb21-66"><a href="#cb21-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># State FIPS codes are always two digits, like 15, 50, </span></span>
<span id="cb21-67"><a href="#cb21-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># and 02. R was reading in single digits like 02 as</span></span>
<span id="cb21-68"><a href="#cb21-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># just 2, which is a problem later on. To fix this</span></span>
<span id="cb21-69"><a href="#cb21-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># I used the function sprintf to tell R to add</span></span>
<span id="cb21-70"><a href="#cb21-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># leading zeroes to state_fips_rough until there</span></span>
<span id="cb21-71"><a href="#cb21-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># were two digits per entry. So a value of 4 would</span></span>
<span id="cb21-72"><a href="#cb21-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># turn into 04, but 36 would stay 36! I can&#39;t spend</span></span>
<span id="cb21-73"><a href="#cb21-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># more time on this now, but if people are interested</span></span>
<span id="cb21-74"><a href="#cb21-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># in this kind of data manipulation, I am happy to write</span></span>
<span id="cb21-75"><a href="#cb21-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># about it!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-76"><a href="#cb21-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  )</span>
<span id="cb21-77"><a href="#cb21-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-78"><a href="#cb21-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># hey R, for the following, use ces2020_selected please!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-79"><a href="#cb21-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ces2020_selected <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-80"><a href="#cb21-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-81"><a href="#cb21-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># whatever calculation I tell you to do, please</span></span>
<span id="cb21-82"><a href="#cb21-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># do it grouped--- that is, only within entries</span></span>
<span id="cb21-83"><a href="#cb21-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># with the same state FIPS code.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-84"><a href="#cb21-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">group_by</span>(state_fips) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-85"><a href="#cb21-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-86"><a href="#cb21-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># could you tell me how many entries I have per</span></span>
<span id="cb21-87"><a href="#cb21-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># state?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-88"><a href="#cb21-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">summarise</span>(<span class="at">n =</span> <span class="fu">n</span>())</span>
<span id="cb21-89"><a href="#cb21-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-90"><a href="#cb21-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-91"><a href="#cb21-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># you&#39;ll notice that the whole table does not print here.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-92"><a href="#cb21-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># To see the entire thing, print it in your R console</span></span>
<span id="cb21-93"><a href="#cb21-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>post_aggregate <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> ces2020_selected <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-94"><a href="#cb21-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">group_by</span>(state_fips) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-95"><a href="#cb21-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-96"><a href="#cb21-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># give me the mean of tookpost_recoded </span></span>
<span id="cb21-97"><a href="#cb21-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># for each state, and make that a new</span></span>
<span id="cb21-98"><a href="#cb21-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># variable called mean_post</span></span>
<span id="cb21-99"><a href="#cb21-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">summarise</span>(<span class="at">mean_post =</span> <span class="fu">mean</span>(tookpost_recoded))</span>
<span id="cb21-100"><a href="#cb21-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-101"><a href="#cb21-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># let&#39;s take a look!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-102"><a href="#cb21-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>post_aggregate</span>
<span id="cb21-103"><a href="#cb21-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>post_map <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">left_join</span>(post_aggregate, </span>
<span id="cb21-104"><a href="#cb21-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      states, <span class="at">by =</span> <span class="st">&quot;state_fips&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-105"><a href="#cb21-105" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-106"><a href="#cb21-106" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>post_map</span>
<span id="cb21-107"><a href="#cb21-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Plotting </span></span>
<span id="cb21-108"><a href="#cb21-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Code adapted from: </span></span>
<span id="cb21-109"><a href="#cb21-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># https://www.cgoodman.com/blog/archives/2018/06/16/maps-in-r-using-urbnmapr/</span></span>
<span id="cb21-110"><a href="#cb21-110" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I also retain some of Chris&#39; annotations here for clarity.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-111"><a href="#cb21-111" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-112"><a href="#cb21-112" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">ggplot</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-113"><a href="#cb21-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-114"><a href="#cb21-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># county map</span></span>
<span id="cb21-115"><a href="#cb21-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> post_map,</span>
<span id="cb21-116"><a href="#cb21-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> long, <span class="at">y =</span> lat,</span>
<span id="cb21-117"><a href="#cb21-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">group =</span> group,</span>
<span id="cb21-118"><a href="#cb21-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             </span>
<span id="cb21-119"><a href="#cb21-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># I want the color </span></span>
<span id="cb21-120"><a href="#cb21-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># that each state</span></span>
<span id="cb21-121"><a href="#cb21-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># has to depend</span></span>
<span id="cb21-122"><a href="#cb21-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># on mean_post!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-123"><a href="#cb21-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">fill =</span> mean_post)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-124"><a href="#cb21-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> </span>
<span id="cb21-125"><a href="#cb21-125" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="co"># add state outlines using urbnmapr</span></span>
<span id="cb21-126"><a href="#cb21-126" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> urbnmapr<span class="sc">::</span>states,</span>
<span id="cb21-127"><a href="#cb21-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># when we write urbnmapr::states</span></span>
<span id="cb21-128"><a href="#cb21-128" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># we are telling R to specifically</span></span>
<span id="cb21-129"><a href="#cb21-129" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># use the urbnmapr package to pull up</span></span>
<span id="cb21-130"><a href="#cb21-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># states. Some coders like using this notation</span></span>
<span id="cb21-131"><a href="#cb21-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># consistently ---whenever they use a function</span></span>
<span id="cb21-132"><a href="#cb21-132" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># they tell R which package it comes from.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-133"><a href="#cb21-133" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># I don&#39;t do that, but if your code is</span></span>
<span id="cb21-134"><a href="#cb21-134" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># breaking and you don&#39;t know why--- try</span></span>
<span id="cb21-135"><a href="#cb21-135" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># calling on the package explicitly (sometimes)</span></span>
<span id="cb21-136"><a href="#cb21-136" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># packages have functions that are named the</span></span>
<span id="cb21-137"><a href="#cb21-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># same thing, which confuses R!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-138"><a href="#cb21-138" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               </span>
<span id="cb21-139"><a href="#cb21-139" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(long, lat,<span class="at">group =</span> group),</span>
<span id="cb21-140"><a href="#cb21-140" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">fill =</span> <span class="cn">NA</span>, <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;#ffffff&quot;</span>, <span class="at">size =</span> <span class="fl">0.4</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-141"><a href="#cb21-141" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-142"><a href="#cb21-142" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># projection</span></span>
<span id="cb21-143"><a href="#cb21-143" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">coord_map</span>(<span class="at">projection =</span> <span class="st">&quot;polyconic&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-144"><a href="#cb21-144" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-145"><a href="#cb21-145" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I want to create a scale that goes from low to</span></span>
<span id="cb21-146"><a href="#cb21-146" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># high, where the color of the high value connotes</span></span>
<span id="cb21-147"><a href="#cb21-147" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># that things are good. In the United States,</span></span>
<span id="cb21-148"><a href="#cb21-148" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># the color green is often the &quot;good&quot; or &quot;everything&#39;s</span></span>
<span id="cb21-149"><a href="#cb21-149" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># fine&quot; color, so I&#39;ll use a version of that.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-150"><a href="#cb21-150" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-151"><a href="#cb21-151" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># You can find an R Color Cheat Sheet here by Melanie Frazier: </span></span>
<span id="cb21-152"><a href="#cb21-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># https://www.nceas.ucsb.edu/sites/default/files/2020-04/colorPaletteCheatsheet.pdf</span></span>
<span id="cb21-153"><a href="#cb21-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient</span>(<span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-154"><a href="#cb21-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;seagreen4&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-155"><a href="#cb21-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      </span>
<span id="cb21-156"><a href="#cb21-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># I can define limits explicitly if I want.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-157"><a href="#cb21-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># If you do this, always check that you are not</span></span>
<span id="cb21-158"><a href="#cb21-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># accidentally excluding data! (I made sure all my)</span></span>
<span id="cb21-159"><a href="#cb21-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># data fit in this range reasonably.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-160"><a href="#cb21-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">limits =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="fl">0.75</span>, <span class="fl">0.95</span>), </span>
<span id="cb21-161"><a href="#cb21-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      </span>
<span id="cb21-162"><a href="#cb21-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># Right now my code is in decimals.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-163"><a href="#cb21-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># We can use a trick we learned last tutorial</span></span>
<span id="cb21-164"><a href="#cb21-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># to make the labels into integer percentages.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-165"><a href="#cb21-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># Try changing the accuracy = 5L argument</span></span>
<span id="cb21-166"><a href="#cb21-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># to learn what it does!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-167"><a href="#cb21-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">labels =</span> <span class="fu">percent_format</span>(<span class="at">accuracy =</span> 5L)) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb21-168"><a href="#cb21-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Theming</span></span>
<span id="cb21-169"><a href="#cb21-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme_minimal</span>(<span class="at">base_family =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-170"><a href="#cb21-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-171"><a href="#cb21-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;right&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-172"><a href="#cb21-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.text.align =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-173"><a href="#cb21-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.title =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-174"><a href="#cb21-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">plot.margin =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">c</span>(.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">2</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-175"><a href="#cb21-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-176"><a href="#cb21-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-177"><a href="#cb21-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-178"><a href="#cb21-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-179"><a href="#cb21-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-180"><a href="#cb21-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-181"><a href="#cb21-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-182"><a href="#cb21-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-183"><a href="#cb21-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.minor =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-184"><a href="#cb21-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-185"><a href="#cb21-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-186"><a href="#cb21-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># some useful titles!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-187"><a href="#cb21-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-188"><a href="#cb21-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-189"><a href="#cb21-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;% of Respondents Who Took the Post Election Survey&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-190"><a href="#cb21-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Author: Pia Deshpande, </span><span class="sc">\n</span><span class="st"> Data: 2020 Cooperative Election Study&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-191"><a href="#cb21-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-192"><a href="#cb21-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Plotting (Code adapted from https://www.cgoodman.com/blog/archives/2018/06/16/maps-in-r-using-urbnmapr/)</span></span>
<span id="cb21-193"><a href="#cb21-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-194"><a href="#cb21-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">ggplot</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-195"><a href="#cb21-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># County map</span></span>
<span id="cb21-196"><a href="#cb21-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> post_map,</span>
<span id="cb21-197"><a href="#cb21-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> long, <span class="at">y =</span> lat,</span>
<span id="cb21-198"><a href="#cb21-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">group =</span> group,</span>
<span id="cb21-199"><a href="#cb21-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">fill =</span> mean_post)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-200"><a href="#cb21-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Add state outlines</span></span>
<span id="cb21-201"><a href="#cb21-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> urbnmapr<span class="sc">::</span>states,</span>
<span id="cb21-202"><a href="#cb21-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(long, lat,<span class="at">group =</span> group),</span>
<span id="cb21-203"><a href="#cb21-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">fill =</span> <span class="cn">NA</span>, <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;#ffffff&quot;</span>, <span class="at">size =</span> <span class="fl">0.4</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-204"><a href="#cb21-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Projection</span></span>
<span id="cb21-205"><a href="#cb21-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">coord_map</span>(<span class="at">projection =</span> <span class="st">&quot;polyconic&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-206"><a href="#cb21-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-207"><a href="#cb21-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># scale_fill_gradient 2 helps us create *diverging* color scales!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-208"><a href="#cb21-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I define red as a low point, white as the middle, and green</span></span>
<span id="cb21-209"><a href="#cb21-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># as the high point. </span></span>
<span id="cb21-210"><a href="#cb21-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient2</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-211"><a href="#cb21-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;red&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-212"><a href="#cb21-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">mid =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-213"><a href="#cb21-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;seagreen4&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-214"><a href="#cb21-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-215"><a href="#cb21-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I define the midpoint explicitly here! </span></span>
<span id="cb21-216"><a href="#cb21-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I calculate it not as the mean of all the </span></span>
<span id="cb21-217"><a href="#cb21-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># state averages, but as the mean of all CES</span></span>
<span id="cb21-218"><a href="#cb21-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># respondents. That value will be where the</span></span>
<span id="cb21-219"><a href="#cb21-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># scale is a stark white.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-220"><a href="#cb21-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">midpoint =</span> <span class="fu">mean</span>(ces2020_selected<span class="sc">$</span>tookpost_recoded),</span>
<span id="cb21-221"><a href="#cb21-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">limits =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="fl">0.75</span>, <span class="fl">0.95</span>), </span>
<span id="cb21-222"><a href="#cb21-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">labels =</span> <span class="fu">percent_format</span>(<span class="at">accuracy =</span> 5L)</span>
<span id="cb21-223"><a href="#cb21-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-224"><a href="#cb21-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Theming</span></span>
<span id="cb21-225"><a href="#cb21-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme_minimal</span>(<span class="at">base_family =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-226"><a href="#cb21-226" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-227"><a href="#cb21-227" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;right&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-228"><a href="#cb21-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.text.align =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-229"><a href="#cb21-229" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.title =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-230"><a href="#cb21-230" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">plot.margin =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">c</span>(.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">2</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-231"><a href="#cb21-231" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-232"><a href="#cb21-232" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-233"><a href="#cb21-233" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-234"><a href="#cb21-234" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-235"><a href="#cb21-235" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-236"><a href="#cb21-236" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-237"><a href="#cb21-237" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-238"><a href="#cb21-238" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-239"><a href="#cb21-239" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.minor =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-240"><a href="#cb21-240" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb21-241"><a href="#cb21-241" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-242"><a href="#cb21-242" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-243"><a href="#cb21-243" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;% of Respondents Who Took the Post Election Survey&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-244"><a href="#cb21-244" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Author: Pia Deshpande, </span><span class="sc">\n</span><span class="st"> Data: 2020 Cooperative Election Study&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-245"><a href="#cb21-245" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-246"><a href="#cb21-246" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Let&#39;s try making a substantive map: what percentage of respondents were contacted</span></span>
<span id="cb21-247"><a href="#cb21-247" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># by a political campaign in 2020?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-248"><a href="#cb21-248" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-249"><a href="#cb21-249" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Let&#39;s select variables that we care about!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-250"><a href="#cb21-250" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ces2020_substantive <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> ces2020_dataverse <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-251"><a href="#cb21-251" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">select</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-252"><a href="#cb21-252" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-253"><a href="#cb21-253" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># id for each respondent</span></span>
<span id="cb21-254"><a href="#cb21-254" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    caseid, </span>
<span id="cb21-255"><a href="#cb21-255" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-256"><a href="#cb21-256" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># weight for survey analysis!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-257"><a href="#cb21-257" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    commonpostweight, </span>
<span id="cb21-258"><a href="#cb21-258" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-259"><a href="#cb21-259" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># state respondent is registered in</span></span>
<span id="cb21-260"><a href="#cb21-260" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">state_fips_rough =</span> inputstate_post, </span>
<span id="cb21-261"><a href="#cb21-261" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-262"><a href="#cb21-262" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co"># were you contacted by a political campaign in 2020?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-263"><a href="#cb21-263" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    CC20_431a) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-264"><a href="#cb21-264" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-265"><a href="#cb21-265" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">mutate</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-266"><a href="#cb21-266" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">contact =</span> <span class="fu">case_when</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-267"><a href="#cb21-267" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      </span>
<span id="cb21-268"><a href="#cb21-268" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co"># I am recoding this so a &quot;Yes&quot; is a 1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-269"><a href="#cb21-269" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co"># and a &quot;No&quot; is a 0.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-270"><a href="#cb21-270" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      CC20_431a <span class="sc">==</span> <span class="dv">1</span> <span class="sc">~</span> <span class="dv">1</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-271"><a href="#cb21-271" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      CC20_431a <span class="sc">==</span> <span class="dv">2</span> <span class="sc">~</span> <span class="dv">0</span></span>
<span id="cb21-272"><a href="#cb21-272" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    ),</span>
<span id="cb21-273"><a href="#cb21-273" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">state_fips =</span> <span class="fu">as.character</span>(<span class="fu">sprintf</span>(<span class="st">&quot;%02d&quot;</span>, state_fips_rough))</span>
<span id="cb21-274"><a href="#cb21-274" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-275"><a href="#cb21-275" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-276"><a href="#cb21-276" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># We don&#39;t want to include someone if they did not take the post-election survey</span></span>
<span id="cb21-277"><a href="#cb21-277" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">drop_na</span>(commonpostweight)</span>
<span id="cb21-278"><a href="#cb21-278" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-279"><a href="#cb21-279" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-280"><a href="#cb21-280" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Check sample sizes of each state</span></span>
<span id="cb21-281"><a href="#cb21-281" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sample_cutoff <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> ces2020_substantive <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-282"><a href="#cb21-282" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">group_by</span>(state_fips) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-283"><a href="#cb21-283" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">summarise</span>(<span class="at">n =</span> <span class="fu">n</span>()) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-284"><a href="#cb21-284" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-285"><a href="#cb21-285" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># only give me states with less than 200 responses</span></span>
<span id="cb21-286"><a href="#cb21-286" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">filter</span>(n <span class="sc">&lt;</span> <span class="dv">200</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-287"><a href="#cb21-287" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-288"><a href="#cb21-288" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sample_cutoff</span>
<span id="cb21-289"><a href="#cb21-289" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-290"><a href="#cb21-290" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>survey <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">svydesign</span>(<span class="at">ids =</span> <span class="sc">~</span><span class="dv">0</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-291"><a href="#cb21-291" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="at">data =</span> ces2020_substantive, </span>
<span id="cb21-292"><a href="#cb21-292" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="at">weights =</span> <span class="sc">~</span>commonpostweight)</span>
<span id="cb21-293"><a href="#cb21-293" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-294"><a href="#cb21-294" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_state <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">as.data.frame</span>(<span class="fu">svyby</span>(<span class="sc">~</span>contact, </span>
<span id="cb21-295"><a href="#cb21-295" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     <span class="sc">~</span>state_fips, </span>
<span id="cb21-296"><a href="#cb21-296" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     survey, </span>
<span id="cb21-297"><a href="#cb21-297" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     svymean, </span>
<span id="cb21-298"><a href="#cb21-298" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     <span class="at">na.rm =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>)) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-299"><a href="#cb21-299" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-300"><a href="#cb21-300" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I&#39;m telling R to select all state_fips that were not in our</span></span>
<span id="cb21-301"><a href="#cb21-301" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># table of states with less than &lt;200 entries!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-302"><a href="#cb21-302" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">filter</span>(<span class="sc">!</span>(state_fips <span class="sc">%in%</span> sample_cutoff<span class="sc">$</span>state_fips))</span>
<span id="cb21-303"><a href="#cb21-303" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-304"><a href="#cb21-304" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Join with urbnmapr</span></span>
<span id="cb21-305"><a href="#cb21-305" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_map <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">left_join</span>(contact_state, </span>
<span id="cb21-306"><a href="#cb21-306" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                         states, <span class="at">by =</span> <span class="st">&quot;state_fips&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-307"><a href="#cb21-307" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-308"><a href="#cb21-308" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-309"><a href="#cb21-309" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Spoiler! This step will let us make a tile map later on. We&#39;re specifying the dimensions of the </span></span>
<span id="cb21-310"><a href="#cb21-310" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># tile here. I want my tiles to be square, but you can change this as you see fit.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-311"><a href="#cb21-311" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">mutate</span>(<span class="at">xdimension =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-312"><a href="#cb21-312" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         <span class="at">ydimension =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>) </span>
<span id="cb21-313"><a href="#cb21-313" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">ggplot</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-314"><a href="#cb21-314" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># County map</span></span>
<span id="cb21-315"><a href="#cb21-315" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> contact_map,</span>
<span id="cb21-316"><a href="#cb21-316" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> long, <span class="at">y =</span> lat,</span>
<span id="cb21-317"><a href="#cb21-317" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">group =</span> group,</span>
<span id="cb21-318"><a href="#cb21-318" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             </span>
<span id="cb21-319"><a href="#cb21-319" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># our variable of interest!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-320"><a href="#cb21-320" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">fill =</span> contact)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-321"><a href="#cb21-321" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Add state outlines</span></span>
<span id="cb21-322"><a href="#cb21-322" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> urbnmapr<span class="sc">::</span>states,</span>
<span id="cb21-323"><a href="#cb21-323" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(long, lat,<span class="at">group =</span> group),</span>
<span id="cb21-324"><a href="#cb21-324" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               </span>
<span id="cb21-325"><a href="#cb21-325" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># with the color argument, I am giving</span></span>
<span id="cb21-326"><a href="#cb21-326" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># states a grey outline!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-327"><a href="#cb21-327" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">fill =</span> <span class="cn">NA</span>, <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;grey30&quot;</span>, <span class="at">size =</span> <span class="fl">0.4</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-328"><a href="#cb21-328" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Projection</span></span>
<span id="cb21-329"><a href="#cb21-329" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">coord_map</span>(<span class="at">projection =</span> <span class="st">&quot;polyconic&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-330"><a href="#cb21-330" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-331"><a href="#cb21-331" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># purple seems like a bipartisan color?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-332"><a href="#cb21-332" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient</span>(<span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;plum&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-333"><a href="#cb21-333" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;mediumpurple4&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-334"><a href="#cb21-334" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">labels =</span> <span class="fu">percent_format</span>(<span class="at">accuracy =</span> 5L),</span>
<span id="cb21-335"><a href="#cb21-335" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">limits =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="fl">0.35</span>, <span class="fl">0.75</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-336"><a href="#cb21-336" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      </span>
<span id="cb21-337"><a href="#cb21-337" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># This blank &quot;&quot; means I do not want my </span></span>
<span id="cb21-338"><a href="#cb21-338" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># legend to have a title.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-339"><a href="#cb21-339" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb21-340"><a href="#cb21-340" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-341"><a href="#cb21-341" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Theming</span></span>
<span id="cb21-342"><a href="#cb21-342" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme_minimal</span>(<span class="at">base_family =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-343"><a href="#cb21-343" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-344"><a href="#cb21-344" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;right&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-345"><a href="#cb21-345" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.text.align =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-346"><a href="#cb21-346" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">plot.margin =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">c</span>(.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">2</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-347"><a href="#cb21-347" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-348"><a href="#cb21-348" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-349"><a href="#cb21-349" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-350"><a href="#cb21-350" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-351"><a href="#cb21-351" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-352"><a href="#cb21-352" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-353"><a href="#cb21-353" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-354"><a href="#cb21-354" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-355"><a href="#cb21-355" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.minor =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-356"><a href="#cb21-356" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb21-357"><a href="#cb21-357" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.title=</span><span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">family=</span><span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Bold&quot;</span>, <span class="at">margin=</span><span class="fu">margin</span>(<span class="at">b=</span><span class="dv">15</span>)))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-358"><a href="#cb21-358" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.subtitle=</span><span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">family=</span><span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light Italic&quot;</span>))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-359"><a href="#cb21-359" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.margin=</span><span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">rep</span>(<span class="fl">0.5</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-360"><a href="#cb21-360" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-361"><a href="#cb21-361" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-362"><a href="#cb21-362" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;% of Respondents Contacted by a Political Campaign in 2020&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-363"><a href="#cb21-363" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Author: Pia Deshpande, Data: 2020 Cooperative Election Study&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-364"><a href="#cb21-364" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># The following code is adapted from the Urban Institute&#39;s Tutorial</span></span>
<span id="cb21-365"><a href="#cb21-365" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># https://urbaninstitute.github.io/r-at-urban/mapping.html#geom_tile()</span></span>
<span id="cb21-366"><a href="#cb21-366" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-367"><a href="#cb21-367" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># create a custom geofacet grid</span></span>
<span id="cb21-368"><a href="#cb21-368" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># This was constructed by the Urban Institute! I am using it here.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-369"><a href="#cb21-369" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># It tells R how to draw the grid, and how to name each square.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-370"><a href="#cb21-370" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I am grateful someone else wrote this and not me!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-371"><a href="#cb21-371" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-372"><a href="#cb21-372" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>urban_grid <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">tibble</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-373"><a href="#cb21-373" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">row =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-374"><a href="#cb21-374" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-375"><a href="#cb21-375" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-376"><a href="#cb21-376" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">col =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-377"><a href="#cb21-377" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">code =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;AK&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ME&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;VT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NH&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ID&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ND&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IL&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OR&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;SD&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OH&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;PA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NJ&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;RI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;UT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NE&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;KY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;VA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MD&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DE&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AZ&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NM&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;KS&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AR&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;TN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;SC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OK&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;LA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MS&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AL&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;GA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;HI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;TX&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;FL&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-378"><a href="#cb21-378" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">name =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Alaska&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Maine&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Wisconsin&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Vermont&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Hampshire&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Washington&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Idaho&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Montana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;North Dakota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Minnesota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Illinois&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Michigan&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New York&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Massachusetts&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Oregon&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Nevada&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Wyoming&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;South Dakota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Iowa&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Indiana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Ohio&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Pennsylvania&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Jersey&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Connecticut&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Rhode Island&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;California&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Utah&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Colorado&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Nebraska&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Missouri&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Kentucky&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;West Virginia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Virginia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Maryland&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Delaware&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Arizona&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Mexico&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Kansas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Arkansas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Tennessee&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot; North Carolina&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;South Carolina&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot; District of Columbia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Oklahoma&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Louisiana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Mississippi&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Alabama&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Georgia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Hawaii&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Texas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Florida&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-379"><a href="#cb21-379" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb21-380"><a href="#cb21-380" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-381"><a href="#cb21-381" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-382"><a href="#cb21-382" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_map <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-383"><a href="#cb21-383" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-384"><a href="#cb21-384" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># remember when I defined xdimension and ydimension a while ago?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-385"><a href="#cb21-385" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># It&#39;s coming in handy here!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-386"><a href="#cb21-386" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">ggplot</span>(<span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> xdimension, <span class="at">y =</span> ydimension, <span class="at">fill =</span> contact)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-387"><a href="#cb21-387" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-388"><a href="#cb21-388" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># We&#39;re making a tile map!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-389"><a href="#cb21-389" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_tile</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-390"><a href="#cb21-390" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-391"><a href="#cb21-391" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I am defining some display text here. I want</span></span>
<span id="cb21-392"><a href="#cb21-392" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># to print the value of &quot;contact,&quot; which is the </span></span>
<span id="cb21-393"><a href="#cb21-393" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># estimated percentage of Americans in a certain</span></span>
<span id="cb21-394"><a href="#cb21-394" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># state who were contacted by a political campaign!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-395"><a href="#cb21-395" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-396"><a href="#cb21-396" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># However, this number is a decimal. Another way</span></span>
<span id="cb21-397"><a href="#cb21-397" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># of formatting percentages is by multiplying them by 100</span></span>
<span id="cb21-398"><a href="#cb21-398" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># and using the round function (I wanted no decimal places).</span></span>
<span id="cb21-399"><a href="#cb21-399" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I then use the paste0 function to add a pretty percentage sign!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-400"><a href="#cb21-400" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_text</span>(<span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">label =</span> <span class="fu">paste0</span>(<span class="fu">round</span>(contact<span class="sc">*</span><span class="dv">100</span>,<span class="dv">0</span>), <span class="st">&quot;%&quot;</span>)),</span>
<span id="cb21-401"><a href="#cb21-401" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            </span>
<span id="cb21-402"><a href="#cb21-402" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="co"># this makes the text white!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-403"><a href="#cb21-403" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-404"><a href="#cb21-404" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-405"><a href="#cb21-405" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Using our grid from before. Thanks again to the Urban Institute!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-406"><a href="#cb21-406" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I also want to facet by state_abbv (That is, make a new tile) for</span></span>
<span id="cb21-407"><a href="#cb21-407" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># each state abbreviation.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-408"><a href="#cb21-408" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">facet_geo</span>(<span class="at">facets =</span> <span class="sc">~</span>state_abbv, <span class="at">grid =</span> urban_grid) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-409"><a href="#cb21-409" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Percentage of Americans Contacted by a Political Campaign in 2020&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-410"><a href="#cb21-410" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">subtitle =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Adapted from Code from the Urban Institute&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-411"><a href="#cb21-411" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Graph by Pia Deshpande </span><span class="sc">\n</span><span class="st"> Data from the 2020 CES&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-412"><a href="#cb21-412" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">x =</span> <span class="cn">NULL</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-413"><a href="#cb21-413" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="cn">NULL</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-414"><a href="#cb21-414" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-415"><a href="#cb21-415" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb21-416"><a href="#cb21-416" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Purple all the way down!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-417"><a href="#cb21-417" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;plum&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-418"><a href="#cb21-418" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;mediumpurple4&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-419"><a href="#cb21-419" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-420"><a href="#cb21-420" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># No legend title please</span></span>
<span id="cb21-421"><a href="#cb21-421" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-422"><a href="#cb21-422" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb21-423"><a href="#cb21-423" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.background =</span> <span class="fu">element_rect</span>(<span class="at">colour =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-424"><a href="#cb21-424" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.grid =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-425"><a href="#cb21-425" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-426"><a href="#cb21-426" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.text =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-427"><a href="#cb21-427" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-428"><a href="#cb21-428" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb21-429"><a href="#cb21-429" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.spacing =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(0L, <span class="st">&quot;pt&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb21-430"><a href="#cb21-430" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;none&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-431"><a href="#cb21-431" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">strip.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">size =</span> 9L))</span>
<span id="cb21-432"><a href="#cb21-432" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-433"><a href="#cb21-433" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Code taken from: https://rstudio.github.io/leaflet/basemaps.html</span></span>
<span id="cb21-434"><a href="#cb21-434" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># An excellent official leaflet tutorial!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-435"><a href="#cb21-435" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-436"><a href="#cb21-436" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">leaflet</span>(states) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-437"><a href="#cb21-437" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># This tells leaflet to pull from its states library</span></span>
<span id="cb21-438"><a href="#cb21-438" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-439"><a href="#cb21-439" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">setView</span>(<span class="at">lng =</span> <span class="sc">-</span><span class="dv">71</span>, <span class="at">lat =</span> <span class="dv">43</span>, <span class="at">zoom =</span> <span class="dv">8</span>) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span> </span>
<span id="cb21-440"><a href="#cb21-440" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># This gives it a desired longitude and latitude and zoom level</span></span>
<span id="cb21-441"><a href="#cb21-441" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># zoom = 12 is way more zoomed in than zoom = 2 (that is,</span></span>
