<span id="cb21-442"><a href="#cb21-442" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># larger numbers mean our map will be more zoomed in).</span></span>
<span id="cb21-443"><a href="#cb21-443" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb21-444"><a href="#cb21-444" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addTiles</span>()</span>
<span id="cb21-445"><a href="#cb21-445" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-446"><a href="#cb21-446" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Get the data here: https://github.com/minh5/wafflehouse/blob/master/webscraping/geoWaffles.csv</span></span>
<span id="cb21-447"><a href="#cb21-447" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># The Waffle House data has not been updated since 2015, unfortunately :(</span></span>
<span id="cb21-448"><a href="#cb21-448" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-449"><a href="#cb21-449" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>waffle <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">read.csv</span>(<span class="fu">here</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Data/geoWaffles.csv&quot;</span>))</span>
<span id="cb21-450"><a href="#cb21-450" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I am using the here() package to load this csv in with a relative file path.</span></span>
<span id="cb21-451"><a href="#cb21-451" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># If this is new to you, feel free to load in the data using an absolute</span></span>
<span id="cb21-452"><a href="#cb21-452" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># file path (however you would normally load in data), but I would</span></span>
<span id="cb21-453"><a href="#cb21-453" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># suggest looking into here() and using project structure in the future!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-454"><a href="#cb21-454" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-455"><a href="#cb21-455" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># https://learn.r-journalism.com/en/mapping/leaflet_maps/leaflet/</span></span>
<span id="cb21-456"><a href="#cb21-456" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-457"><a href="#cb21-457" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">leaflet</span>(waffle) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-458"><a href="#cb21-458" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># We are telling leaflet to use the waffle dataframe</span></span>
<span id="cb21-459"><a href="#cb21-459" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-460"><a href="#cb21-460" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addCircles</span>(<span class="sc">~</span>lngs,</span>
<span id="cb21-461"><a href="#cb21-461" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># the longitude column</span></span>
<span id="cb21-462"><a href="#cb21-462" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb21-463"><a href="#cb21-463" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="sc">~</span>lats, </span>
<span id="cb21-464"><a href="#cb21-464" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># the latitude column</span></span>
<span id="cb21-465"><a href="#cb21-465" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb21-466"><a href="#cb21-466" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">weight =</span> <span class="dv">3</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-467"><a href="#cb21-467" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">radius=</span><span class="dv">40</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-468"><a href="#cb21-468" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># how big do we want our circles to be?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-469"><a href="#cb21-469" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">color=</span><span class="st">&quot;#ffa500&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb21-470"><a href="#cb21-470" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># what color do we want them to be?</span></span>
<span id="cb21-471"><a href="#cb21-471" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb21-472"><a href="#cb21-472" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">stroke =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-473"><a href="#cb21-473" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># try changing this to</span></span>
<span id="cb21-474"><a href="#cb21-474" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># stroke = FALSE and seeing</span></span>
<span id="cb21-475"><a href="#cb21-475" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># what happens!</span></span>
<span id="cb21-476"><a href="#cb21-476" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb21-477"><a href="#cb21-477" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">fillOpacity =</span> <span class="fl">0.8</span>)  <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-478"><a href="#cb21-478" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># how transparent? </span></span>
<span id="cb21-479"><a href="#cb21-479" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># fillOpacity = 1 is opaque, </span></span>
<span id="cb21-480"><a href="#cb21-480" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># while fillOpacity = 0 is completely transparent</span></span>
<span id="cb21-481"><a href="#cb21-481" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addTiles</span>()</span></code></pre></div>
</div>




</div>

<script>

// add bootstrap table styles to pandoc tables
function bootstrapStylePandocTables() {
  $('tr.odd').parent('tbody').parent('table').addClass('table table-condensed');
}
$(document).ready(function () {
  bootstrapStylePandocTables();
});


</script>

<!-- tabsets -->

<script>
$(document).ready(function () {
  window.buildTabsets("TOC");
});

$(document).ready(function () {
  $('.tabset-dropdown > .nav-tabs > li').click(function () {
    $(this).parent().toggleClass('nav-tabs-open');
  });
});
</script>

<!-- code folding -->


<!-- dynamically load mathjax for compatibility with self-contained -->
<script>
  (function () {
    var script = document.createElement("script");
    script.type = "text/javascript";
    script.src  = "https://mathjax.rstudio.com/latest/MathJax.js?config=TeX-AMS-MML_HTMLorMML";
    document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0].appendChild(script);
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
